issue_exact_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
prompt:
TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one HARD flat square — zero anti-aliasing, zero soft blends, zero sub-pixel detail.

Tiny centered Neonstorm Coil inventory item in a SEA of empty magenta. The coil must be SMALL in frame: about 24–26 logical pixels tall, with at least FOUR full magenta #ff00ff cells of empty clearance on every edge. Subject must NOT touch or approach the canvas border.

Three-quarter display: compact induction coil. FLAT poster colors only, no gradients:
1) storm-slate #55586a metal body (warm purple-grey, never blue steel)
2) crow-black #1e1c29 inner recesses
3) diner-teal #1f9277 winding bands
4) teal-light #4fb99b alternate winding (muted green-teal, never mint/cyan)
5) diner-cream #f3d897 one highlight stripe
6) one condiment-red #c83d3d indicator dot
7) oil-ink #111018 1px outline

Structural members ≥3 logical pixels thick. No Character, duck, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, silver, cyan, or transparency. Magenta background only.
